_comment: S19-4: Advisory suppression list for `pnpm audit`. Each entry MUST include a justification and expiry date. Review monthly and prune expired entries — the goal is zero entries.

_schema.advisory: Numeric advisory ID from pnpm audit output
_schema.justification: Why this is safe to suppress (dev dep only, no upstream fix, scope limited, etc.)
_schema.expiresAt: ISO date — re-evaluate by this date
_schema.owner: Email of person responsible for tracking
